title: SOC Investigation Knowledge Entry
description: One curated reference doc — a MITRE ATT&CK technique investigation guide or an IR playbook — that the Guardian incident-investigation agent semantically searches (knowledge_search) to ground its analysis of Cortex XSOAR incidents. Distinct from memory: knowledge is curated, shipped reference material; memory is the agent's accumulated, mutable org-specific facts.

id.description: Stable doc id — the ATT&CK technique id for techniques (e.g. 'T1071.004') or a 'pb-<slug>' for playbooks (e.g. 'pb-ransomware'). Used as the doc_id in kb.db so re-loading is idempotent.

title.description: Human-readable title. Included in the embedded searchable content, so it should describe the investigator's intent.

category.description: Doc type. Operators/agent can filter knowledge_search by category.

tags.description: Tactic + keyword tags; surface as UI filter chips.
